outages.headline: Ukrainian Drones Strike Port, Oil Depot In Southern Russia
outages.summary: May 30 (Reuters) – Ukrainian drone strikes hit Russia’s oil infrastructure overnight, damaging a tanker and an oil refinery in Taganrog and striking an oil depot in Armavir, Russian regional officials and...
